summary: Phase C Platform Alignment Testing Complete. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all Phase C features: Partner Application Page (/partners/apply), Admin Affiliate Applications management, CRM Page V2 with List/Cards/Kanban views, Customers Page V2 with 4 filter dropdowns and Table/Cards views, Creative Service Brief Page with dynamic form fields, Central Payments page, and Statements page.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Affiliate portal was redirecting to /affiliate/login which is not a defined route - showed blank page

seed_data_creation: Test affiliate application created and approved during backend testing. Affiliate record created with unique promo code.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C Platform Alignment tested and all issues fixed. Key features verified: 1) POST /api/affiliate-applications - public application submission, 2) GET /api/affiliate-applications - admin listing with status filter, 3) POST /api/affiliate-applications/{id}/approve - creates affiliate with promo code, 4) GET /api/affiliate-portal/dashboard - affiliate dashboard (requires auth), 5) /partners/apply frontend page - full application form, 6) /admin/affiliate-applications - admin management with approve/reject. Fixed: Affiliate portal redirect to /auth page. CRM V2, Customers V2, Creative Brief, Central Payments, Statements all verified working.
features_verified: Partner Application Page (/partners/apply) - form with all sections - WORKING
Admin Affiliate Applications - list, filter, approve, reject - WORKING
Affiliate Portal Dashboard - auth redirect fixed, now redirects to /auth - WORKING
CRM Page V2 - List/Cards/Kanban views - WORKING
Customers Page V2 - Table/Cards views with 4 filters - WORKING
Creative Brief Page - dynamic form fields and addons - WORKING
Central Payments - payment list with verify/reject actions - WORKING
